personalRules: Example: I respond best to upper/lower split, not full-body sessions.

_schema_notes.name: Used in the trainer's introductions and reviews.
_schema_notes.device: Mentioned in context so the coach knows what metrics are available (e.g., Body Battery on Venu, HRV nightly on Forerunner 955+).
_schema_notes.primarySport: The dominant sport you train for. Affects load assumptions and rest cadence.
_schema_notes.secondaryFocus: Additional training modalities — pure strength, hypertrophy, zone-2, etc.
_schema_notes.typicalWeek: Used to enforce 'don't stack new load on top' constraint. All fields optional; only the ones you set are mentioned.
_schema_notes.personalRules: Free-form bullets injected verbatim into the coach's context. Use these to capture lessons learned from your data ('my reload depth is -5% not -10%', 'I always undershoot lunge volume', etc.). Edit as patterns emerge.
